prevalence.trend: increasing with aging and diabetes prevalence

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to pain, gait impairment and falls

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical neuropathic symptoms and exam; nerve conduction studies when indicated; evaluate reversible causes

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with structured care and access to neurology

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: EMG/NCS widely available; multidisciplinary neuropathy clinics in many systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Treat underlying cause, neuropathic pain meds, physiotherapy and fall prevention
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Polypharmacy in older adults and chronic pain management
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Broad access to diagnostics and guideline-based therapies
